_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Heat Map sample payload. Layer-level view: 7 processes total, 6 scored. Color zones: Red/High Risk (2 processes), Yellow/Medium Risk (3 processes), Green/Low Risk (1 process). 1 process unscored. Color names and classification labels are client-configured — not hardcoded.

_drillDownExamples.entity: If user clicks 'DMI Finance' → viewContext.currentLevel becomes 'entity', itemType becomes 'layer', contextPath becomes 'DMI Finance', colorDistribution shows layers of DMI Finance
_drillDownExamples.layer: This payload (processes within 'DMI Finance > Consumer Layer')
_drillDownExamples.process: If user clicks 'Customer Onboarding Process' → itemType becomes 'risk', contextPath becomes 'DMI Finance > Consumer Layer > Customer Onboarding Process'

colorDistribution.description: 6 scored processes: 2 Red (High Risk), 3 Yellow (Medium Risk), 1 Green (Low Risk). 1 process unscored.

priorityItems.description: Top 3 processes by residual score requiring immediate audit attention within DMI Finance > Consumer Layer.
